title: Bead 1: Core Execution Framework Documentation
description: Create comprehensive documentation for the PostHog HogAI Core Execution Framework with enough detail to reimplement from scratch. Focus on: class hierarchy (BaseAgentExecutable, BaseAssistantNode, BaseAssistantGraph), execution pipeline (__call__, _execute, _arun_with_context), node path context (contextvars), dispatcher integration, and graph building API. Output: docs/hogai/01-core-execution-framework.md. Source: posthog-master/ee/hogai/core/base.py, node.py, executable.py

title: Implementation planning complete for multi-agent chatbot
description: Phase 0-1 planning completed. Generated: plan.md, research.md, data-model.md, contracts/api.yaml, quickstart.md. Ready for /speckit.tasks.

title: Create multi-agent chatbot specification
description: Create feature specification for multi-agent chatbot with frontend/backend tool calls, dynamic contexts, and agent mode selection

title: Bead 2: State Management System Documentation
description: Create comprehensive documentation for the PostHog HogAI State Management System with enough detail to reimplement from scratch. Focus on: state classes (AssistantState, PartialAssistantState), message merging strategy (add_and_merge_messages), ReplaceMessages wrapper, field annotations (replace, append), and state update patterns. Output: docs/hogai/02-state-management.md. Source: posthog-master/ee/hogai/utils/types/base.py

title: Bead 5: Agent Modes System Documentation
description: Create comprehensive documentation for the PostHog HogAI Agent Modes System with enough detail to reimplement from scratch. Focus on: AgentModeDefinition dataclass structure, AgentModeManager abstract base with registry, mode presets (Product Analytics, SQL, Session Replay), AgentToolkitManager.get_tools() dynamic assembly, SwitchModeTool injection with mode registry. Output: docs/hogai/05-agent-modes.md. Source: posthog-master/ee/hogai/core/agent_modes/ directory

title: HogAI README Integration Overview
description: Create a README.md that ties all 10 documentation beads together. Include: architecture diagram (ASCII), quick start guide, component relationships, key flows (user message → response, tool execution, mode switching), reimplementation checklist, and links to each bead document. Output: docs/hogai/README.md

title: Bead 7: Prompt System Documentation
description: Create comprehensive documentation for the PostHog HogAI Prompt System with enough detail to reimplement from scratch. Focus on: AgentPromptBuilder abstract interface, Mustache-style templates with {{{variable}}}, context_prompt_template for steering, dynamic prompt generation in create_tool_class, example patterns (positive/negative todo examples). Output: docs/hogai/07-prompt-system.md. Source: posthog-master/ee/hogai/core/agent_modes/prompt_builder.py, shared_prompts.py, tool prompts

title: Bead 4: Tool System Architecture Documentation
description: Create comprehensive documentation for the PostHog HogAI Tool System Architecture with enough detail to reimplement from scratch. Focus on: MaxTool class structure with LangChain integration, tool definition pattern (args_schema, description, _arun_impl), create_tool_class factory method, auto-registration via __init_subclass__, ToolMessagesArtifact for multi-message returns, error types (MaxToolFatalError, MaxToolRetryableError, MaxToolTransientError). Output: docs/hogai/04-tool-system.md. Source: posthog-master/ee/hogai/tool.py, registry.py, tools/__init__.py

title: Bead 10: Example Tool Implementations Documentation
description: Create comprehensive documentation with 3-4 representative tool implementations showing different patterns. Focus on: SearchTool (delegate pattern with subtools), CreateInsightTool (subgraph execution pattern), ExecuteSQLTool (artifact creation pattern), SwitchModeTool (dynamic schema generation). Output: docs/hogai/10-example-tools.md. Source: posthog-master/ee/hogai/tools/search.py, create_insight.py, execute_sql/tool.py, switch_mode.py

title: Bead 6: Context Switching Mechanism Documentation
description: Create comprehensive documentation for the PostHog HogAI Context Switching Mechanism with enough detail to reimplement from scratch. Focus on: SwitchModeTool dynamic args schema generation, mode change detection in AgentExecutable._get_updated_agent_mode(), state propagation of agent_mode field, compaction manager mode reminders, UI context preservation across switches. Output: docs/hogai/06-context-switching.md. Source: posthog-master/ee/hogai/tools/switch_mode.py, core/agent_modes/executables.py, compaction_manager.py

title: Bead 3: Runner & Streaming Architecture Documentation
description: Create comprehensive documentation for the PostHog HogAI Runner & Streaming Architecture with enough detail to reimplement from scratch. Focus on: BaseAgentRunner class, astream() generator pattern, state initialization, update processing, conversation locking (IDLE→IN_PROGRESS→IDLE), error handling, and AgentExecutor Temporal integration. Output: docs/hogai/03-runner-streaming.md. Source: posthog-master/ee/hogai/core/runner.py, executor.py, stream_processor.py

title: Bead 8: Dispatcher & Event System Documentation
description: Create comprehensive documentation for the PostHog HogAI Dispatcher & Event System with enough detail to reimplement from scratch. Focus on: AssistantDispatcher event emission, action types (MessageAction, NodeStartAction, NodeEndAction, UpdateAction), non-blocking error handling, stream writer integration. Output: docs/hogai/08-dispatcher-events.md. Source: posthog-master/ee/hogai/utils/dispatcher.py, action types in utils/types

title: Bead 9: Checkpoint & Persistence Documentation
description: Create comprehensive documentation for the PostHog HogAI Checkpoint & Persistence system with enough detail to reimplement from scratch. Focus on: DjangoCheckpointer implementation, checkpoint namespaces for subgraphs, state resumption after interrupts, NodeInterrupt for form-based pausing. Output: docs/hogai/09-checkpoint-persistence.md. Source: posthog-master/ee/hogai/django_checkpoint/checkpointer.py
